subcodes.first_line: In the Bisharat [Glad-Tidings] it hath been revealed that the undertaking of journeys for the purpose of visiting graves is not permitted. The intention of this concerneth travel from one country to another merely [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در بشارات نازل که شدّ رحال برای زیارت قبور جائز نه مقصد اینست از کشوری بکشوری محض
subcodes.subjects: @law of burial and cremation, @eulogies; reminiscences, @Shrines and Holy places
